jobs.title: Full-stack developer at Novo Nordisk Engineering
jobs.description:
**Full\-stack developer at Novo Nordisk Engineering**
If you are energized by building modern web applications across front\-end, backend and cloud, and you thrive on turning complex engineering needs into robust digital solutions, we’d love to hear from you.  

**Who we are**
We are a leading pharma engineering company shaping the future of API pharma engineering globally. Leveraging the expertise of 2,000\+ employees across Denmark, India, and the US, we design, build and optimise pharmaceutical manufacturing facilities that are essential to the health and well\-being of patients everywhere.
Our success is driven by passion, innovation, and collaboration — with our customers and across our teams and disciplines. If you share our dedication to a noble cause and our passion for API pharma engineering, then NNE is the place for you.  

  



**About the role**


We are looking for a full\-stack developer to join our system development team in Global IT. As a team, we support NNE’s engineering project portfolios and build modern web applications that help colleagues work smarter across projects and locations.
  

In this role, you will contribute across the full development lifecycle, from concept and technical design to development, testing, deployment, and operation.
  

You will work alongside engineers, supporters and developers, take ownership of what you build, and help shape scalable, maintainable technical solutions. You will also review the work of peers across seniority levels and support knowledge sharing with less experienced colleagues.  

**Location** Denmark \- Virum
  

**Experience** Minimum 2 Years
  

**Department** Global IT  

  

**How you might spend your days**
As a full\-stack developer you’ll be:
* Designing, building and maintaining modern web applications, APIs and services for NNE’s engineering project portfolios
* Contributing end\-to\-end from concept and technical design through development, testing, deployment and operation
* Collaborating with engineers, supporters, and developers to translate business needs into scalable, maintainable solutions
* Shaping technical designs, reviewing code and helping improve quality, architecture and ways of working
* Supporting upskilling and sharing knowledge with junior colleagues and peers

**Who you are**
We care about who you are as a person. In the end, how you work, and your energy is what impacts the results we achieve as a team. As a person, you are:
* Taking ownership of deliverables, plans and prioritizes tasks, and makes sound decisions with limited oversight
* Structured, quality\-focused, and result\-oriented in the way you solve problems and deliver outcomes
* Collaborative and comfortable working with colleagues across disciplines, locations, and cultures
* Curious and proactive in suggesting improvements to tools, processes and technical solutions
* Supportive in code reviews and coaching, and open to learning from mistakes with high spirits and a sense of humor

**What you bring to the role**
In all positions, there are some things that are preferred, and others, a bonus. If you do not meet all the qualifications listed below, you are welcome to offer alternative experience that you think would be valuable in this role:
* You hold a bachelor’s or master’s degree in computer science, Engineering or a related field.
* You have hands\-on backend experience with a modern framework such as .NET, Node.js or Python, including RESTful APIs and common architectural/design patterns.
* You have strong frontend experience with HTML, CSS and JavaScript/TypeScript, preferably with React and modern tooling such as Next.js or Vite.
* You have solid experience with relational database design, SQL, and agile practices such as Scrum or Kanban.
* You have experience with Git, CI/CD, automated testing, and cloud\-based application development, preferably on Microsoft Azure.

It is a bonus if you have experience with containerization, NoSQL databases, ORM tools, message queues or event\-driven architectures, or integrating AI capabilities into applications such as LLM APIs, RAG, agentic workflows or MCP servers.  

**Life at NNE**
NNE is short for Novo Nordisk Engineering. And for all of us who work here, NNE means so much more.


At NNE, you become part of a vibrant, project\-based environment built on close day\-to\-day collaboration. The role is therefore primarily on\-site, with physical presence at the workplace expected five days a week. Limited flexibility for occasional remote work may be accommodated in line with business needs.


We are, at our core, a people business and, as such, committed to continuously developing our people and the way we work together. We do not expect you to know it all from day one, and we truly believe a great start makes a real difference. We therefore welcome new colleagues with our award\-nominated onboarding programme, supported by a range of in\-house talent and development initiatives designed to support your long\-term growth.
You can read more about the benefits we offer **here****.**

  

**Did we spark your curiosity? If you’re ready to join our passion, let’s hear from you.**

  

**Deadline of application is** **9th August 2026**

  

Questions before applying? Send us a quick text to arrange a convenient time to chat. Contact Manager, Ivanna Jurkiv Ditlevsen at \+45 3077 4721\.
**Please note:**
* We only accept applications submitted through our online recruitment system
* You do not need to attach a cover letter, but please include a few sentences about why you are applying in your resume or CV
* We invite to interviews on a running basis.

**Fair hiring:**
At NNE, we are committed to an inclusive recruitment process and equal opportunities for all job applicants. To maintain fairness, we request that you refrain from including a personal photo in your CV.
**Still searching for the right opportunity?**
If this position isn’t quite what you're looking for, but you know someone who would excel in this role, please share this job post. And don’t forget to explore our other exciting opportunities — your future role at NNE might be just around the corner! Visit our Career Site

jobs.title: Database Migrations Engineer
jobs.description:
Laravel is the most popular PHP framework in the world. 500M\+ lifetime downloads. Thousands of packages. A developer community that shows up at conferences, in forums, on Twitter, in Discord servers, in every "what framework should I use?" thread on the internet.


But Laravel is more than a framework. It's a complete platform. From choosing a stack, to building an app, to deploying it, monitoring it, and scaling it. Laravel Cloud is our managed PaaS, and enterprise customers moving onto it face a common, stubborn blocker: database migration. We need someone who solves that problem directly.


Why This Job Is Unique**You will be on calls with enterprise customers and you will run the migration with them.** Not routing tickets. Not advising from a distance. Actually owning the technical execution alongside the customer \- which matters most when we sign a large, impactful contract and need to deliver.

**You are picking up a real, ongoing function.** There is existing database migration work that needs an owner \- including the PlanetScale relationship and recurring ad\-hoc requests scattered across channels. You are not starting from zero.

**The brief is to build the muscle, not wait for the full menu.** Rather than first defining every database we will ever offer, you are the one who develops the function in practice. You’ll be learning what customers need, productising the repeatable parts, and making the case for what comes next.

**You will seed what you know.** The model is "immediate pain relief, then the whole team gets better." Documentation, runbooks, and lightweight training so Sales, CS and engineering compound on your expertise rather than staying dependent on it.


What the Database Migrations Engineer Will Do* **Execute database migrations with enterprise and Private Cloud customers.** Sit on calls, own the technical execution, and deliver successful migrations for customers onboarding to Laravel Cloud \- primarily MySQL and Postgres.
* **Assume ownership of the PlanetScale relationship and migration work.** Take over this function from its current ad\-hoc state and run it cleanly and autonomously.
* **Productise repeatable migration patterns.** Identify the most common downtime\-tolerant migrations and package them \- documentation, decision logic, edge cases \- so they stop being bespoke. We want repeatability over heroics — and with an eye towards eventually bringing that knowledge in\-product, whether through documentation, wizards, or self\-serve flows, so that product\-led customers can benefit too.
* **Automate recurring migration requests.** Map the one\-off requests that surface repeatedly across channels and eliminate the manual effort.
* **Own broader app and service migrations in the gaps.** Act as a generalist migration resource for application and service migrations onto Private Cloud when database migration work permits.
* **Distribute what you learn.** Write clearly. Build runbooks. Create reference material that makes Sales, CS and engineering better without making them dependent on you.
* **Keep the database offering competitive.** Stay close to the market — monitoring what alternatives like PlanetScale, Aurora, and Percona offer in terms of pricing, instance classes, and capabilities. Flag proactively when our offering is out of step with what customers are seeing elsewhere, and advise on what needs to change.

  

**Requirements**  

  

What We Are Looking For* **Genuine strength across both MySQL and Postgres.** We are deliberately optimising for \~80% capability in each over 100% in one. Database specialists tend to plant a flag, and we need coverage across both camps.
* **Direct experience with database migrations in a customer\-facing capacity.** You have been on the calls, you have run the process alongside engineers and customers, and you are comfortable owning the technical execution rather than advising on it.
* **A productisation instinct.** You see the repeatable pattern inside bespoke work and know how to package it without over\-engineering.
* **Strong written and async communication.** We are fully remote and documentation is how knowledge compounds.
* **Comfort operating in a role where part of the scope is yours to define.** There is a clear immediate need, and you will also be shaping what the function looks like from here.


Nice to Have* Experience at a database tooling or infrastructure company \- PlanetScale, Percona, Vitess, or similar
* Experience building tooling or automation around migration workflows
* Familiarity with AWS\-based infrastructure or PaaS environments
* Experience with AWS DMS or comparable migration tooling — DMS has a role in certain migrations and prior use is a strong signal of hands\-on production database migration experience
* A track record of writing, speaking, or teaching publicly about database topics
* Some familiarity with PHP applications

  

**Benefits**  

* Work From Home
* Health Care Plan (Medical, Dental \& Vision)
* Paid Time Off (Vacation, Sick \& Public Holidays)
* Family Leave (Maternity, Paternity)
* Stock Option Plan

jobs.title: Domain Architect til alka.dk (28578)
jobs.description:
Vil du være arkitekten bag den fortsatte udvikling af alka.dk? Vi står foran en modernisering af vores digitale platform, og som Domain Architect får du en central rolle i at definere den tekniske retning og omsætte arkitektur til løsninger, der kan udvikle sig i takt med kundernes forventninger og forretningens ambitioner.


Du bliver en del af vores Arkitekt \& DevOps team, hvor du sparer og sætter retning sammen med de øvrige arkitekter. Men hos os er arkitektur ikke noget, der foregår langt fra udviklingen. Vi tror på, at de bedste arkitekturbeslutninger træffes i tæt dialog med dem, der bygger løsningerne. Derfor er du også synlig i udviklingsteamsene, deltager i tekniske diskussioner og hjælper med at omsætte arkitektur til konkrete løsninger.


**Om jobbet \| Arkitekt med hænderne i teknikken**


Du bliver ansvarlig for arkitekturen bag alka.dk og får stor indflydelse på de tekniske valg, der former platformens videre udvikling. Sammen med udviklingsteamsene og de øvrige arkitekter sikrer du, at løsningerne hænger naturligt sammen på tværs af frontend, integrationslag og vores kerneforsikringssystem – og at de både understøtter en god kundeoplevelse og en robust teknisk platform.


Du kommer til at:


* drive den tekniske retning for alka.dk
* fungere som teknisk sparringspartner for udviklingsteams
* sikre skalerbare, robuste og vedligeholdelsesvenlige løsninger
* facilitere og træffe arkitekturvalg i komplekse problemstillinger sammen med de øvrige arkitekter
* balancere langsigtede arkitekturprincipper med konkrete leverancebehov

**Om dig \| Nysgerrig teamplayer og teknisk stærk sparringspartner**

Du har sandsynligvis en baggrund som Tech Lead, Lead Developer, senior udvikler eller Software Architect og har gerne 3\-5 års erfaring i en arkitekt(\-lignende) rolle. Du trives med at skabe retning uden at miste kontakten til teknikken. Og du motiveres af at indgå i et stærkt team og sparre med udviklere, udfordre designbeslutninger og skabe en arkitektur, der både fungerer i dag og kan udvikle sig i morgen.


Du har erfaring med software\- og løsningsarkitektur på tværs af frontend, integrationer og backend og formår at omsætte komplekse tekniske behov til robuste og skalerbare løsninger. Samtidig følger du udviklingen inden for AI\-teknologier tæt og har erfaring med, eller en stærk interesse for, hvordan AI kan anvendes til at skabe værdi i både softwareudvikling og arkitektur.


Vi forestiller os, at du har erfaring med flere af følgende områder:


* API\-design og moderne integrationsmønstre
* Frontend\-teknologier som JavaScript/TypeScript og Vue.js eller Angular
* CMS\-platforme – gerne Sitecore eller Optimizely
* C\# og Web API'er
* Testautomatisering

Du behøver ikke være frontend\-specialist, men du skal kunne forstå moderne frontend\-arkitektur og være en kvalificeret sparringspartner for udviklerne. Vi forventer desuden, at du tænker sikkerhed ind i løsningerne fra start. Erfaring med DevOps er en fordel, men ikke et krav.


Som person tager du ansvar for retning og fremdrift, og du formår at skabe følgeskab omkring tekniske beslutninger. Du er en stærk kommunikator, der kan gøre komplekse problemstillinger konkrete og forståelige. Du er nysgerrig, pragmatisk og trives i tæt samarbejde med både udviklere og forretning.


**Om os \| En digital udviklingsafdeling med et varmt fællesskab**


Du bliver en del af den agile IT\-organisation Kundevendt Digitalisering med omkring 60 kolleger, herunder udviklingsteams, arkitekter, drift og DevOps\-specialister. Sammen udvikler og driver vi Alkas digitale, kundevendte løsninger.


Vi arbejder agilt i tværfaglige teams med høj grad af autonomi. Arkitekterne er en integreret del af udviklingsorganisationen og spiller en aktiv rolle i de tekniske beslutninger. Vi prioriterer faglig sparring, videndeling og en kultur, hvor gode idéer vejer tungere end titler.


Kulturen er uformel og varm, og vi tror på, at mangfoldighed gør os stærkere.


**Vi glæder os til at høre fra dig!**


Lyder det som en rolle, hvor du kan gøre en forskel? Så send din ansøgning og dit CV senest 11\. august 2026\. Vi opfordrer til, at du undlader at vedhæfte billede i dit CV.
  

  

Har du spørgsmål til stillingen, er du velkommen til at kontakte Enterprise Architect Arnt Christensen på arnt.christensen@alka.dk eller rekrutterende leder Ditte Andersen ditte.a@alka.dk. Da vi er i en sommerperiode, kan du opleve lidt længere svartid.


1\. samtaler forventes at blive afholdt i uge 34, hvor der vil være forberedelse i form af en case der skal præsenteres. Går man videre i forløbet vil der også være samtaler i uge 35\.
